{{Quote|Gentlebeings, your mission is to find me a safeworld.|Captain Longmar|<ref name="TP" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Longmar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Pegasus Strike Force]]. In this capacity, he was captain of the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Liberty Gambler]]''.

==Biography==
When his strike force was forced to give two of its most powerful warships up, he realized the his fleet would not stand a chance against the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Behemoth (Imperial-class)|''Behemoth'']] which was on the hunt for the Rebels. He therefore sent a group of operatives to [[Orellon II]] to establish whether it was a good [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]] for him.<ref name="TP" />

{{Char-stub}}
